creator: alexbestms@uni-muenster.de
text:
2010/8/10 Gabor PALI <pgj@freebsd.org>:
> Hello Alex,
>
> I think this change is not required, since it is quite straightforward
> and mailman has a nice user-friendly interface. =A0Direct links to all
> the available options would make the document way too complicated in
> my opinion.

hi gabor,

i believe you are right. mailman features so many options it's
impossible to document them all in the freebsd docs.

the PR can be closed imo.

cheers.
alex

>
>
> :g
>
